meaning: adj.鍦ㄤ笉鍚屽湴鍖哄彂鐢熺殑,鍗曠嫭鍦板彂鐢熺殑
examples: This division set the stage for allopatric speciation among populations of fishes and other marine species.
Allopatric speciation can also be brought by the imperceptibly slow but colossal movements of the tectonic plates that make up Earth's surface.
Formenkreis a group of related allopatric species or subspecies.
